grf.name: Timberwolf/Wolfie's Trains De-Duplication
grf.description: A GRF to disable trains in Timberwolf's Trains which are duplicated in Wolfie's Trains.

parameters.name: Increase Bogie Brake Speeds
parameters.desc: If turned on, increase the maximum speed of the Clerestory and Standard Passenger brake coaches to match the speeds of the vehicles they are based on.
